title: Classes, Private State, Inheritance, and Composition · Semantics Case: Instance Contracts
summary: Build maintainable scheduling components with explicit invariants and replaceable policies. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js instance contracts increment in a policy-driven scheduling component library. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Enforce constructor and method invariants with changed-case tests rather than relying on nominal class names.
Prefer composition and injected policies when behaviors vary independently or require isolated testing.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
